title: About

🎓 PhD in Physics, Pukyong National University
🏫 Assistant Professor, Department of Artificial Intelligence
🔬 AI-based atmospheric and environmental prediction modeling

title: About

title: About
text:
Research Areas

Causal Inference: Transfer Entropy, PCMCI, IMV-LSTM
Time Series Deep Learning: Transformer, LSTM, CNN-based forecasting
Atmospheric & Environmental AI: FLUXNET CH₄ flux prediction, meteorological data analysis
XAI: Explainable AI for environmental prediction

title: Privacy Policy
text:
Google Analytics
This site uses Google Analytics to collect visitor statistics. Google Analytics uses cookies, and collected data is processed anonymously. You can review Google’s Privacy Policy here.

title: Privacy Policy

This site displays advertisements through Google AdSense. Google may use cookies to show ads based on your interests. To opt out of personalized advertising, visit Google Ad Settings.

title: Categories
text:
CH₄ Flux Prediction Using Transfer Entropy-based IMV-LSTM



Causal Inference

Deep Learning

Time Series

Python



We introduce a TE-IMV-LSTM framework that integrates Transfer Entropy as a variable selection criterion into the IMV-LSTM architecture, validated on FLUXNET CH₄ data.





Apr 10, 2026


Prof. Shin (phyzik)





No matching items

title: CH₄ Flux Prediction Using Transfer Entropy-based IMV-LSTM
text:
Transfer Entropy (TE) is a nonlinear causality measure based on information theory.
import numpy as np

def transfer_entropy(X, Y, k=1, bins=10):
    X_d = np.digitize(X, np.histogram_bin_edges(X, bins=bins))
    Y_d = np.digitize(Y, np.histogram_bin_edges(Y, bins=bins))
    # TE computation logic
    return te
